courses.title: Drum Foundations
courses.description: Build timing, coordination, and groove fundamentals.

modules.title: Drum Introduction
modules.description: Get comfortable with the drum kit layout and foundational setup.

lessons.title: How to Hold Drumsticks
lessons.description: Learn matched grip, fulcrum control, and relaxed motion.
lessons.objective: Establish correct hand position and controlled rebound before rudiment practice.
learningObjectives: Identify proper thumb and index fulcrum placement.
Demonstrate relaxed matched grip without excess tension.
Control rebound with even stick height in both hands.
Maintain balanced posture and wrist motion while striking.

lessons.title: Introduction of the Kit
lessons.description: Understand each drum and cymbal role one by one.
lessons.objective: Identify core kit pieces and map basic note positions to each drum part.
learningObjectives: Identify snare, kick, hi-hat, toms, and crash/ride cymbals.
Associate common note positions with each drum part.
Play single hits on each kit piece at a steady tempo.
Transition between kit pieces while keeping simple time.

exercises.title: Kit Notes - 60 BPM
exercises.description: Single-note kit mapping at slow tempo.

modules.title: Rudiment Basics
modules.description: Start with core sticking patterns and control.

lessons.title: Single Strokes
lessons.description: Play consistent alternating strokes at slow tempo.
lessons.objective: Maintain even dynamics and timing for one full phrase.
learningObjectives: Identify snare, hi-hat, bass drum, and metronome cue before starting.
Demonstrate correct matched grip and relaxed stick control.
Alternate right and left hand strokes evenly for full practice phrases.
Keep consistent timing at slow tempo without rushing or dragging.

lessons.title: Double Strokes
lessons.objective: Play doubles evenly for the full bar pattern.
learningObjectives: Control stick rebound to produce two clean notes per hand.
Maintain equal volume between first and second notes in each double.
Execute continuous double-stroke patterns without tension buildup.
Stay aligned with the beat across complete bar repetitions.

exercises.title: Double Strokes - 60 BPM
exercises.description: Controlled doubles at a steady tempo.

modules.title: Core Grooves
modules.description: Move rudiments into musical groove patterns.

lessons.title: Basic Rock Groove
lessons.objective: Keep groove consistent with minimal timing drift.
learningObjectives: Identify the role of kick, snare, and hi-hat in a basic 4/4 groove.
Coordinate right hand timekeeping with backbeat snare placement.
Place kick drum notes accurately under steady hi-hat pulse.
Maintain groove consistency for full sections at target tempo.

courses.title: Drum Development
courses.description: Expand groove vocabulary, control dynamics, and improve transitions.

modules.title: Groove Variations
modules.description: Add syncopation and ghost notes to core patterns.

lessons.title: Syncopated Rock
lessons.description: Introduce off-beat kick placement while keeping steady hi-hat time.
lessons.objective: Perform groove variations accurately for the full progression.
learningObjectives: Read and count off-beat kick placements within a 4/4 bar.
Keep hi-hat subdivision stable while moving kick notes off the beat.
Maintain backbeat consistency during syncopated pattern changes.
Perform full groove progressions with accurate transitions.

lessons.title: Ghost Note Control
lessons.description: Develop soft snare articulation without losing backbeat impact.
lessons.objective: Maintain dynamic contrast between ghost and accent strokes.
learningObjectives: Differentiate ghost notes from accented backbeats by touch and volume.
Play consistent low-volume ghost notes between main snare accents.
Preserve strong backbeat impact while keeping ghost notes controlled.
Maintain dynamic balance through complete groove phrases.

exercises.title: Ghost Notes - Level 1
exercises.description: Basic ghost note placement in 4/4 groove.

modules.title: Fills and Transitions
modules.description: Connect sections musically with clean, in-time fills.

lessons.title: One-Bar Fills
lessons.description: Practice common one-bar fill groupings across the kit.
lessons.objective: Return to the downbeat cleanly after each fill.
learningObjectives: Orchestrate one-bar fill patterns across snare and tom surfaces.
Keep subdivision count steady while moving around the kit.
Control stick heights to balance fill dynamics and clarity.
Re-enter the groove on beat one without timing disruption.

courses.title: Drum Performance
courses.description: Master advanced timing, independence, and performance-ready endurance.

modules.title: Polyrhythmic Concepts
modules.description: Train advanced coordination with non-overlapping and cross-rhythm phrasing.

lessons.title: Linear Groove Control
lessons.description: Build speed and precision in linear sticking systems.
lessons.objective: Maintain consistency and timing under higher tempos.
learningObjectives: Execute non-overlapping linear sticking sequences with clean articulation.
Increase tempo while preserving stroke accuracy and motion efficiency.
Maintain balanced dynamics between hand and foot components.
Sustain linear groove precision over extended repetitions.

lessons.title: Polyrhythm
lessons.objective: Lock cross-rhythms without rushing or dragging.
learningObjectives: Count and vocalize 3-over-4 pulse relationships accurately.
Coordinate contrasting limb groupings while keeping a stable pulse.
Resolve cross-rhythm phrases back to the barline cleanly.
Maintain tempo integrity throughout polyrhythmic studies.

modules.title: Endurance
modules.description: Sustain accuracy and power over longer musical sections.

lessons.title: Extended Arrangements
lessons.description: Navigate long-form song structures with dynamic control.
lessons.objective: Complete full arrangement without major timing breakdowns.
learningObjectives: Map song sections and cue transitions across a long-form arrangement.
Apply dynamic shaping between verse, chorus, and bridge sections.
Maintain endurance and posture through sustained performance duration.
Deliver full-run consistency with minimal timing deviation.
